flashcards.back:
Unused EC2 capacity at up to 90% discount.

Can be interrupted with 2-minute warning.

Best for: batch jobs, CI/CD, containers, ML training.
Not for: production DBs, stateful apps.

lowestPrice: Cheapest first
diversified: Spread across pools
capacity-optimized: Least likely to interrupt
priceCapacityOptimized: Balance both
